Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges provided, we can scan each edge and collect the time t whenever node u and node v match the two queried nodes (in either order).

First, we will find the earliest time when node 0 and node 2 are connected. We can do this by scanning the edges from node 0 to all other nodes and from all other nodes to node 2. The earliest time we find is 1, so the answer is:
